name: 戏剧与角色扮演
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 语言表达 / Language / Language Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to use role-play and simple dramatic conventions (e.g., freeze frames, hot-seating) to explore characters, feelings, and different perspectives (K-2).
Students will be able to collaborate to plan, rehearse, and present short devised scenes that communicate a clear message or story (3-5).
